name: historical_notes
Battle of Munda: Compressed Munda: Caesar attacks the fortified high ground of Gnaeus Pompeius and Labienus in southern Hispania in the hard fought final battle of the civil war.

name: ROMAN
column4: drive veteran legions uphill against the Pompeian line and exploit any wavering sector
column5: end the civil war by breaking Gnaeus Pompeius' army

name: POMPEIAN
column4: hold the ridge and fortified camp while Labienus' cavalry threatens Caesar's flank
column5: repel Caesar and preserve the Pompeian cause in Hispania
